subcodes.first_line: Thy letter, which testified to the degrees of powerlessness, nothingness, utter annihilation and absolute non-existence, hath reached the Most Holy Presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت که مشعر بر مراتب عجز و نیستی و فنای بحت و عدم بات بود در محضر اقدس وارد
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
